title: Heart Crystal remodel
description: a remodel of the heart crystal from the RPG Health Overhaul mod
body:
# OVERVIEW

This resource pack simply replaces the model for the Heart Crystal found in the [RPG Health Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/rpg-health-overhaul) mod, with a model made by me

# HOW TO USE

Simply drag and drop or manually put the zip archive into your resource pack screen. You also need to have the aforementioned *RPG Health Overhaul* mod installed as it is a dependency (duh).

# ENJOY!
